svg.text: A human-in-the-loop support model where AI suggests investigation steps, retrieves operational knowledge, explains system context and helps
Routes the event into the pipeline
Retrieves logs, tickets, docs, release notes, code context and known
Uses RAG to reason over operational and engineering
What to check next and why.
Support engineer investigates with AI guidance, validates evidence and
Apply validated fix and confirm recovery.
Route to third line / dev team with
AI helps generate RCA summary, timeline,
Engineer validates final RCA and captures improvement
Approved RCA, new runbooks, release notes and known issues
Every validated incident strengthens future AI-assisted support.

AI does not replace the support engineer. It assists investigation by retrieving relevant operational knowledge, suggesting investigation paths, explaining system behaviour, identifying similar incidents
and helping draft RCA outputs. Engineers remain responsible for validating evidence, applying fixes and approving final customer-facing updates.
